description: AI-powered personalized IELTS speaking corpus generator
author: Xiangbo Cheng

steps.name: Collect MBTI Profile
steps.description: Determine the student's MBTI personality type via test or direct input

mode.description: Whether to run the 12-question test or accept a known type

answers.description: Map of question_id to 'a'/'b' (required when mode=test)

steps.name: Collect Interest Profile
steps.description: Gather the student's interest tags and personal hobby descriptions

tags.description: Selected interest tags from the predefined list

steps.name: Collect IELTS Preferences
steps.description: Gather exam-specific preferences including topics, target score, and date

topic_types.description: Topic categories the student is most concerned about

steps.name: Generate Personalized Corpus
steps.description: Use all collected data to generate a complete personalized speaking corpus

prompts.anchor_generation: You are an expert IELTS speaking coach. Based on the student's MBTI type ({mbti_type}) and their personal interests/experiences, create {count} anchor stories. Each anchor should be a vivid personal narrative that can naturally connect to at least 5 different IELTS topics. Include sensory details, emotional elements, and match the student's communication style.
prompts.bridge_generation: For each IELTS topic below, create a natural bridge response that connects the topic to one of the student's anchor stories. The bridge should feel conversational, be 4-6 sentences (25-35 seconds spoken), and target band {target_score}.
prompts.vocabulary_generation: Create a personalized vocabulary upgrade list for an IELTS candidate with interests in {interests}. Include: interest-specific advanced vocabulary, general high-frequency replacements, connector upgrades, and emotion/description upgrades. Target band {target_score}.
prompts.pattern_generation: Create sentence patterns that match the {mbti_type} communication style. Each pattern should include a template, an example using the student's interests, and guidance on when to use it.
prompts.practice_generation: Create 5 deliberate practice exercises for an IELTS speaking candidate. Each exercise should include a prompt, a thinking guide, and a model answer using the student's anchor stories and vocabulary.
